title: Izmaost's Animated Foliage
description: Adds subtle variants adn animations to the leaves of Minecraft
body:
## ⭐️Animated Leaves⭐️ Izmaost's Animated Foliage is a resource pack that animates the leaves of Minecraft.
## 📋 Requirements 📋 This pack does not require Optifine or any texture stitching mod to work. Other leaf texture packs may not work with this pack (bushy leaf addons could still work). For any issues, questions or requests feel free to reach out on KoFi! ## 🎨 My Creations 🎨 Here you can find resourcepacks made by me: [Izmaost's Animated Foliage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-foliage) [Izmaost's Animated Flora](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-flora) [Izmaost's Floral Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-floral-redstone) [Izmaost's Minimalist Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-minimalistic-redstone) [Izmaost's Modern Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-modern-kitchen) [Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta](https://modrinth.com/project/izmaosts-glazed-terracotta) [Izmaost's Softer Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-softer-weather) [Izmaost's Autumnal Birch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-autumnal-birch)
